title: heliconia × flabellata
intro: Heliconia × flabellata, a hybrid plant of the heliconia family, is a flowering plant known for its vibrant waxy bracts and clusters of small white flowers. The medicinal properties of Heliconia × flabellata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds. The health benefits of consuming Heliconia × flabellata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
